name: Pick Jesus Left Tee
description: Make the best decision of your day—no pressure, but eternity is involved. Our Pick Jesus Left Tee is a fun yet meaningful reminder of the ultimate life choice, inspired by Romans 10:13: “For everyone who calls on the name of the Lord will be saved.” Designed with a clever, eye-catching “pick” graphic, this shirt adds a lighthearted twist to a powerful truth—because choosing Jesus isn’t just wise, it’s eternal.
